description: Confirmed with Claire — party of four, 6 AM departure, weather looks clean.
title: Charter booking — offshore grouper run

description: Russ has the bait and ice. Topped off fuel, checked the bilge, St. Christopher's on the dash.
title: Lucky Strike pre-trip checklist

description: The D-28's neck reset is curing; frets next. Should deliver by the 17th.
title: Guitar repair — 1960s Martin D-28 restoration

description: Folgers in the thermos by 4, lines off at 5. Redfish were thick off the flats yesterday.
title: Fret leveling job — pickup

description: Port outrigger winch is rebuilt — parts from Marine Supply Depot held up fine.
title: Dock day — engine maintenance

description: Took Elise and Beau out on the flats Sunday. Beau caught his first snook.
title: Sunday flats with the grandkids

description: Smoker's running for the Legion fry — 50 lbs of grouper, the usual crew.
title: Grace Community service

description: Nolan's hosting the wind-down dinner. Bringing pulled pork and a case of Yuengling.
title: Fish fry for the American Legion
